subject: Escalation: symposium blockers for North America | Albert Einstein | Q3 review | INIT-6733
body: Intelligence from North America indicates a growing marsupial intent to take over urban zones under the symposium banner. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Albert Einstein and Amelia Earhart. Reference initiative INIT-6733. A revised timeline will be circulated after feedback is collected. Tracking tags: coordination, coffee.
